Home.hero_subtitle: Breaking down barriers to support vulnerable communities in Mozambique through strategic and humanized philanthropy.
Home.how_title: How your help reaches its destination
Home.step1_desc: We map the critical needs of each vulnerable family and community.
Home.step2_desc: We ensure the safe transport of all supplies to the most remote areas.
Home.step3_desc: Our team delivers personally, ensuring transparency and dignity.
Home.quote_text: True philanthropy is not just giving, but creating the conditions for people to thrive with autonomy.
Home.footer_desc: Committed to the dignity and future of the Mozambican people. Together, we transform realities through direct and conscious action.

Impact.item1_title: Support for Flood Victims in Gaza
Impact.item1_desc: Donation of over 3 thousand emergency kits to the population of the Districts of Chókwè and Xai-Xai
Impact.item2_desc: Educational support for 500 children in rural communities

Sobre.hero_subtitle: We are a driving force for change in Mozambique, dedicated to building a future where dignity and opportunity are everyone's right.
Sobre.hist_p1_1: The Cantoná Foundation was born from a deep sense of social responsibility and the clear vision of Mozambican entrepreneur,
Sobre.hist_p2: Faced with the socioeconomic challenges and climatic adversities that frequently plague communities in Mozambique, the need for rapid, structured, and effective intervention became imperative. What began as individual acts of solidarity quickly evolved into a formal institution.
Sobre.hist_p3_1: We do not believe in temporary welfare that generates dependency. Our approach is based on
Sobre.hist_p3_2: : we provide immediate relief when crisis strikes, but we work hard to deliver the tools, education, and infrastructure needed so every family can rebuild autonomously.
Sobre.hist_quote: True philanthropy is about building bridges, not just offering temporary help. It is offering a hand to lift up, and the knowledge to walk on.
Sobre.pillar1_desc: We place human dignity at the center of all operations. We listen to communities before acting, ensuring our solutions address their real needs.
Sobre.pillar2_desc: We apply business management methods to philanthropy. We guarantee total traceability of resources and cutting-edge logistics so help arrives without deviation.
Sobre.pillar3_desc: Our ultimate goal is to become unnecessary. We invest in education, reconstruction, and health to create lasting cycles of economic independence.
Sobre.mvv1_desc: To eliminate barriers to accessing essential resources and promote the sustainable development of Mozambique's most vulnerable communities, acting with precision and humanity where the State and families cannot reach.
Sobre.mvv2_desc: To be the national benchmark institution in strategic philanthropy. We envision a country where the cycle of poverty is broken, empowering individuals towards full financial and social autonomy and dignity.
Sobre.mvv3_desc: Our work is governed by absolute Transparency in resource management, constant social Innovation in applied solutions, unwavering Respect for the dignity of those we help, and Commitment to the durability of results.
Sobre.team_desc: Meet the executive team guiding the strategic vision and on-the-ground operations of the Cantoná Foundation.
Sobre.team1_role: Chairman of the Board of Directors
Sobre.cta_desc: Join our mission and help us transform the future of Mozambique.

ImpactoPage.hero_subtitle: The true mission of the Cantoná Foundation is not written in numbers, but in the heartbeat of every life we touch.
ImpactoPage.g1_year: 2026: The Year of Resilience and Care
ImpactoPage.g1_p15_title: The Shield of Life: Community Vaccination
ImpactoPage.g1_p15_desc: Mozambique's future lies in the health of our children. We went to communities to ensure child vaccination, creating a protective shield so our little ones can grow strong, healthy, and ready to conquer the world.
ImpactoPage.g1_p14_desc: We believe education is the greatest tool for social transformation. This year, we sponsored the future of five children with scholarships.
ImpactoPage.g1_p13_title: A New Home: Malembuane Shelter Center
ImpactoPage.g1_p13_desc: We donated materials to build 10 solid houses, allowing the local government to relocate these families to safe areas.
ImpactoPage.g1_p12_title: Rebuilding Life and Livelihood: Barra and Tofo Market
ImpactoPage.g1_p12_desc: In Tofo, we assisted 200 vendor stalls with food and construction materials. In Barra, we donated materials and paid the technical team to build 40 new houses.
ImpactoPage.g1_p11_title: The Embrace that Defeated Cyclone Guezani
ImpactoPage.g1_p11_desc: At the Mesquita Resettlement Center, we supported over 2,000 people. We delivered 200 zinc sheets and 35 tons of essential goods.
ImpactoPage.g2_year: The Fight Against Floods: The Strength of Our Solidarity
ImpactoPage.g2_p10_desc: We arrived in Tavene with 30 tons of food and various products. Every delivered package was a silent message: "You are not alone."
ImpactoPage.g2_p9_desc: We distributed 50 tons of essential goods and donated 3 heads of cattle.
ImpactoPage.g2_p8_desc: We unloaded 35 tons of food and delivered 3,000 essential survival kits.
ImpactoPage.g2_p7_desc: We took 30 tons of food products and various items to families threatened by the floods.
ImpactoPage.g2_p6_desc: With 15 tons of food, clothing, and various products, we helped the families of Boane start over.
ImpactoPage.g2_p5_title: The Seed of Reconstruction in Moamba
ImpactoPage.g2_p5_desc: In the Moamba district, we left 10 tons of food and assorted goods for the community to restart.
ImpactoPage.g3_year: 2025: Sport as a Force for Transformation
ImpactoPage.g3_p4_desc: We ended the year with an epic month-long tournament, featuring a prize of 100,000 meticais and the honorable presence of the Minister of Youth and Sports.
ImpactoPage.g3_p3_title: The Stage of Stars: Canton 7 League
ImpactoPage.g3_p3_desc: We sponsored the Canton 7 League with a prize of 100,000 meticais, celebrating the talent of our young athletes.
ImpactoPage.g4_p2_title: Walking Side by Side: Hixikanwe Association
ImpactoPage.g4_p2_desc: Through the Hixikanwe Association, we donated food products and essential goods, strengthening the support network for the most vulnerable.
ImpactoPage.g4_p1_desc: Our journey began alongside our elders. We supported the Nursing Home with food and essential goods—not just food, but respect and gratitude.
ImpactoPage.cta_desc: Join the Cantoná Foundation and help us bring dignity and hope to those who need it most.

Contacto.mini_about_desc: Committed to the dignity and future of the Mozambican people since 2024.

Noticias.hero_subtitle: Follow our work's impact across Mozambique's leading news channels and newspapers.
Noticias.news1_title: Support for victims of Cyclone Gezani in Inhambane
Noticias.news1_desc: The Cantoná Foundation donated 35 tons of food and various products, benefiting around 20,000 people, in addition to delivering 2,000 zinc sheets.
Noticias.news2_title: Additional 30 tons of aid directed to Gaza
Noticias.news2_desc: Donation of 30 tons of food products (rice, pasta, sardines, oil), hygiene kits, clothing, and mattresses, helping around 4,000 people in need.
Noticias.news3_title: Donation of 3,000 food kits in Chókwè
Noticias.news3_desc: Support for flood victims in the resettlement centers of Djunissa School (1,300 people) and Xiwakelane, providing basic food baskets, clothes, and flip-flops.
Noticias.cta_title: Are you a journalist or media professional?
Noticias.cta_desc: For interview requests or press materials, please contact our communication office.
